sme_leads.notes: Established barber shop at 293 Shirley Road operating solely on Facebook with zero dedicated website, missing local SEO, Google Maps optimisation, and online booking — ideal entry-level web build.
Active nail salon at 7-9 Pound Tree Road with strong Facebook and Fresha presence but no independent website, meaning they lose organic search traffic to competitors who do have one.
NICEIC-certified electrician marketing exclusively through Facebook with no website at all — a simple 3-page site with a quote form would dramatically improve credibility and inbound leads.
Popular Turkish barber at 8A Deacon Road with great reviews on Fresha and Facebook but no owned web presence, making them invisible on Google Search for 'barber Woolston Southampton'.

Loved local cafe at 9 Church Street with only Facebook and third-party directory listings — a simple site with a menu, opening hours, and Google Maps embed would convert foot-traffic searches immediately.

dts.title: DVSA wait times just hit 20+ weeks — here's how to skip the queue legally
dts.hook: Show a DVSA booking screen with a distant test date, cut to DrivingTestSwap finding an earlier slot. Voiceover: 'You don't have to wait months for your driving test.' End with CTA to drivingtestswap.uk.

dts.title: The driving test hack nobody talks about (and it's completely legal)
dts.hook: Start with the pain of waiting — nervous learner, long DVSA queue — then flip to the swap: someone picks up a cancelled test date in hours. Show the platform in screen-record. End with 'Link in bio.'

athletics.title: From zero to muscle-up — 30-day calisthenics progression
athletics.hook: Film a side-by-side or time-lapse of the same movement drill across 30 days at the gym. Add caption overlay: 'Consistency > motivation every time.' Ends on the clean rep.

athletics.title: Track day sprint session — slow-mo breakdowns
athletics.hook: Film sprint drills at the track with phone or GoPro in slow-mo. Overlay tips: drive phase, arm mechanics, stride length. Caption: 'Speed is built in the off-season.' Shows Dowayne as a credible athlete brand.

aimybiz.title: I gave my sales team an AI coach for 30 days — here's what changed
aimybiz.hook: Open with a stat or a story (e.g. 'Our reps were losing deals at the objection stage, every single week'). Walk through how CloseCoach works with a quick demo. End with a call for sales managers to DM for early access.
aimybiz.format: 2-3 minute talking-head video with screen demo

aimybiz.title: 5 objections your sales team is losing to right now (slide 5 shows the fix)
aimybiz.hook: Carousel covering the 5 most common objections in recruitment/estate agency/car sales. Each slide names the objection, shows a weak vs. strong response. Slide 5 reveals CloseCoach as the training tool that drills these daily.
